学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shaanxi Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 63rd, with recent rankings steadily rising from 71st in 2021 to 63rd, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition; Douyin school popularity total ranking 15th (high heat), in 2021 it ranked 1st on Douyin for the year due to the handwritten admission letter incident; in 2024, there was negative public opinion related to teacher ethics, but no new negative records in reputation evaluation for 2025-2026, with overall attention remaining high; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Psychology A-, Education A-, a total of 3 A- disciplines, with outstanding strength in normal disciplines, providing stable attraction for applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of normal/education majors in 2024 is assessed as "divergent wait-and-see," cooling down from "recommended" in 2022; in 2026, the Physics Category enrollment majors have been adjusted from Chemistry, Mathematics, and Geography Science to Mathematics and Computer Science, with computer majors maintaining high social popularity, potentially increasing application willingness; in 2026, there are approximately 137,000 Physics Category examinees in Chongqing, slightly fewer than in 2025, with a small decrease in the competition base; Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an (neighboring province), geographically close to Chongqing with convenient transportation, and regional preference has some attraction for Chongqing examinees; the university's enrollment scale in Chongqing is small (4 students in Physics Category), belonging to small-batch enrollment, with greater volatility in ranking fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant 33.3% reduction in enrollment plan for Physics Category in 2026, the steady rise in Soft Science rankings, high Douyin attention, and the adjustment of enrollment majors to more popular computer majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 24226, with a range of 23726-24726.
